name: codex-theme-hub
description: Discover, create, switch, submit, and restore Codex themes through a conversational workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Discover, create and switch Codex themes by chatting.
interface.longDescription: Use natural language to discover themes from the live Codex Theme Hub catalog, turn reference images into original theme concepts, install data-only themes with a restore point, and submit generated work only after explicit consent.
defaultPrompt: 安装并应用我在 Codex Theme Hub 选择的主题。
参考我发的图片，生成一个原创 Codex 主题。
把生成的主题提交到 Theme Hub，上传前先向我确认。
把 Codex 换成一个低眩光深色主题。
恢复到我上一个使用的 Codex 主题。
